title: The God of Two Blessings
summary: “And I will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee, and make thy name great; and thou shalt be a blessing” Genesis 12:2 Abraham was blessed twice: once by God and then he became a blessing for the world. We must now allow the curtain to fall on 2022 without first receiving the blessing from the Lord Jesus so that we can become a blessing to others in 2023. How precisely did God bless Abraham? First and foremost, Abraham knew the one God of heaven and earth. This is the greatest blessing of all! “And Jesus answered him, The first of all the commandments is, Hear, O Israel; The Lord our God is one Lord” (Mark 12:29). Kings bowed down to Abraham because of this blessing. The Canaanites were afraid to touch Abraham because his defense was his faith in the one God of heaven and earth. Often in the history of the nation of Israel, the children of Abraham compromised their faith in the one God, but it was as if the unshakeable faith of Abraham in the one God would pull them back to his God.
